## Problem

<!-- What user or maintainer problem does this solve? Link the issue with "Closes #..." when applicable. -->

## Solution

<!-- Explain the approach and why it fits DittoJs architecture. -->

## Validation

<!-- List exact commands and manual checks. Do not write only "tests pass." -->

- [ ] Targeted tests added or updated
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm check:generated` when generator/catalog/registry/recipe output changes

## Visual evidence

<!-- Required for visible UI changes. Add before/after screenshots or a short recording. Otherwise write "Not applicable." -->

## Compatibility and generated output

<!-- Describe public type, manifest, dependency, fixture, migration, or generated-project impact. -->

## Review checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to one problem.
- [ ] Dependency logic remains in the resolver, not the UI.
- [ ] Documentation matches the implemented behavior.
- [ ] Generated files were produced from source inputs rather than edited manually.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, personal data, or unrelated generated artifacts are included.
- [ ] I agree to follow the Code of Conduct and license this contribution under MIT.
